title: Mekanism Bigger Teleporters by yrley
body:
# Mekanism Bigger Teleporters

> ⚠️ **THIS IS NOT MY MOD. I JUST FIXED AN ISSUE WITH DEDICATED SERVERS.**
> 
> Original mod author: https://modrinth.com/user/yrley  
> Original mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-bigger-teleporters

## About

A Mekanism addon that increases teleporter size up to 23×23.

## Features

- The teleporter can now be as big as 23×23 or as small as the default Mekanism teleporter.
- Must have the teleporter block in the center.

## Credits

[Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) by bradyaidanc;
